release_risks.risk: Backend and frontend status contract changed from legacy optimal/fallback to compliance statuses.
release_risks.mitigation: Deploy backend and frontend atomically, or add a temporary compatibility bridge before deploy.

release_risks.risk: Full backend and frontend suites remain red due known legacy/out-of-scope failures.
release_risks.mitigation: Fix, quarantine, or formally waive those failures before production deploy.

required_actions_before_deploy: Resolve, quarantine, or obtain explicit release-owner waiver for backend_full_repo_overall and frontend_full_repo_overall red suites.
Confirm backend and frontend are deployed together because frontend gating expects compliance statuses.
Run the P0 relevant gates again immediately before any deployment: backend 84-test optimizer/suitability/quant set and frontend optimizerP0Contract.
Run a staging/emulator smoke against optimize_portfolio_quant verifying fallback_compliant and fallback_non_compliant payloads.
decision: OPT-3 P0 implementation is contract-clean, but production deploy is not recommended yet while full-suite red state remains unwaived and coordinated backend/frontend rollout has not been approved.
next_recommended_block: BDB-OPT-5 — release waiver/quarantine plan for legacy full-suite failures plus coordinated backend/frontend deploy checklist.
